name: Peach Immortality
description: The Peach of Immortality (蟠桃, pántáo) is a sacred fruit in Chinese mythology and culture, deeply intertwined with themes of longevity, immortality, and divine power. These peaches are not ordinary; they grow in the celestial gardens of Xiwangmu, the Queen Mother of the West, and are said to ripen only once every three thousand years. Consuming a single peach grants immortality, or at least extends one's lifespan significantly. The tree itself is a symbol of eternal life, and its blossoms are associated with springtime renewal and good fortune. In legends, the peaches are carefully guarded and reserved for deities and select mortals deemed worthy. They are often depicted as large, juicy fruits with a rosy hue, radiating an aura of mystical energy. The peach is also believed to ward off evil spirits and promote good health. Its wood is used in rituals, and its blossoms are used in traditional medicine. The cultural significance of the Peach of Immortality extends to art, literature, and folklore, where it frequently appears as a motif representing hope, prosperity, and the pursuit of eternal youth. The peach's association with Xiwangmu further elevates its importance, as she is a powerful figure in the Chinese pantheon, responsible for maintaining cosmic balance and bestowing blessings upon those who are deserving. The peaches are a potent symbol of the potential for humans to transcend their mortal limitations and achieve a state of divine existence, even if only fleetingly.
subtitle: Fruit of Eternal Life and Divine Power

keyMyths.title: Sun Wukong and the Peaches of Immortality
keyMyths.description: Sun Wukong, the Monkey King, raided Xiwangmu's garden and consumed the peaches, gaining immense power and immortality. This act led to his rebellion against Heaven and his subsequent imprisonment under a mountain.

sources.author: Wu Cheng'en
sources.description: A classic Chinese novel featuring the Peach of Immortality in a pivotal plot point.
sources.text: A classic Chinese novel featuring the Peach of Immortality in a pivotal plot point.

sources.author: Livia Kohn
